channel.description: Plan, execute, and ship — Claude Code plugin essays and kit deep-dives from smallorbit.

item.title: Welcome to the smallorbit blog

item.title: Stacked PRs without the headache
item.description: How swarmkit dispatches isolated agents and merges their work top-down
